'''tarungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yajna|yajna]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yajna|yajna]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tarungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæringith|tæringith]] || [[word:tæringij|tæringij]] || [[word:tæringish|tæringish]] || [[word:tæringi|tæringi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tarurunguth|tarurunguth]] || [[word:tarurunguj|tarurunguj]] || [[word:tarurungush|tarurungush]] || [[word:tarurungu|tarurungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tarunguth|tarunguth]] || [[word:tarunguj|tarunguj]] || [[word:tarungush|tarungush]] || [[word:tarungu|tarungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tarufngufth|tarufngufth]] || [[word:tarufngufj|tarufngufj]] || [[word:tarufngufsh|tarufngufsh]] || [[word:tarufnguf|tarufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tarunguthu|tarunguthu]] || [[word:tarunguju|tarunguju]] || [[word:tarungushu|tarungushu]] || [[word:tarunguku|tarunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tarunguth|tarunguth]] || [[word:tarunguj|tarunguj]] || [[word:tarungush|tarungush]] || [[word:tarungu|tarungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tarunguthul|tarunguthul]] || [[word:tarungujul|tarungujul]] || [[word:tarungushul|tarungushul]] || [[word:tarungukul|tarungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tarunguuthuthu|tarunguuthuthu]] || [[word:tarunguujuju|tarunguujuju]] || [[word:tarunguushushu|tarunguushushu]] || [[word:tarunguuku|tarunguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tarunguthun|tarunguthun]] || [[word:tarungujun|tarungujun]] || [[word:tarungushun|tarungushun]] || [[word:tarungukun|tarungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tarunguthuoro|tarunguthuoro]] || [[word:tarungujuoro|tarungujuoro]] || [[word:tarungushuoro|tarungushuoro]] || [[word:tarungukuoro|tarungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
